[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110100001 4
1 0010011100 4
2 0010101000 3
3 0000011010 3
4 1011011100 6
5 1010010101 5
6 0110111011 7
7 1111001001 6
